title: 22:11 â April 5, 2022
body_text:
22:11 â April 5, 2022
Payment Solutions Manual: Update to Wires Part and Forms
We incorporated relevant content from the Funds Transfer Part into the Wires Part and substantively edited and reorganized the Part. As a result, existing Chapters have been renumbered. The Funds Transfers Part has been made obsolete.
Please note, we removed most of compliance content. Instead, contact your compliance officer or FINTRAC for compliance and regulatory information. Subscribers to the Operations Manual Program can also refer to the PCMLTFA Compliance Part for additional information.
We also updated additional Wires Forms.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Wires Part
Section 1.1, Overview of Wires
We updated the list of Wires features.
Section 1.2, System Requirements for Wires
We removed Internet Explorer from the list of supported browsers and added a note that Microsoft Edge is not compatible with the Wires Application.
Section 1.3, Wires Availability
We added and updated this Section. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part.
Section 1.4, Service Charges for Incoming and Outgoing Wires
We added and updated this Section. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part.
Section 1.5, Financial Institutions that Participate in Wires
We added and updated this Section. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part.
Section 1.6, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
We removed the instructions to contact Bank of Canada for conversion rates. Rates are live in Wires.
We removed instructions to contact Treasury if an outgoing wire is cancelled and has a booked rate. Rates are live in Wires.
We removed the contact information for FATF.
Section 1.7, Wires Document Library
We removed contact information for Westkey Graphics. The Foreign Exchange Transaction Ticket, Form 1923, is no longer offered as a printed form.
We updated the names of the following forms:
Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1171
Contingency Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1799
Wire Trace, Recall, and Amendment Request, Form 1917
Wires Data Extract Service Request, Form 2592
Routing Instructions â Canadian Dollar (CAD) Domestic Incoming Wires, Form 2605
Routing Instructions â US Dollar (USD) Incoming Wires, Form 2606
Routing Instructions â Canadian Dollar (CAD) International Incoming Wires, Form 2607
Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule (available to BC and Ontario credit unions only), Form 2725
Routing Instructions â Euro (EUR) Incoming Wires, Form 3710
Routing Instructions â Australian Dollar (AUD) Incoming Wires, Form 3771
Routing Instructions â Swiss Franc (CHF) Incoming Wires, Form 3772
Routing Instructions â British Pound Sterling (GBP) Incoming Wires, Form 3773
Routing Instructions â Japanese Yen (JPY) Incoming Wires, Form 3774
Routing Instructions â Mexican Peso (MXN) Incoming Wires, Form 3775
Routing Instructions â Polish Zloty (PLN) Incoming Wires, Form 3776
Wires Customization Request, Form 6493
International Bank Account Number (IBAN) Countries List, Form 9252
We added the following forms:
Wires Data Extract Service Specification, Form 9327
Routing Instructions â New Zealand Dollar (NZD) Incoming Wires, Form 9352
Uganda â Purpose of Payment Codes, Form 9415
Kazakhstan â Purpose of Payment (Single Payment Classification Code), Form 9471
Chapter 2, Terminology and Frequently Asked Questions
We updated the list of definitions and FAQs.
Chapter 3, Legal Considerations and Policies for Incoming and Outgoing Wires
We added and updated this Section. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part. This Section provides an overview of legal considerations and policies, but not an exhaustive list. For more information, see your compliance officer or FINTRAC for guidance. Subscribers can also refer to the Operations Manual Program.
Chapter 4, Customizing Wires Elements
We added information on customizing Wires fees and reorganized the content in this Chapter.
We added Section 4.4, Wires Data Extract Service (BC, Manitoba, Ontario and other Central 1 Clients Only), from the Funds Transfers Part.
Chapter 5, Selecting a Wires Processing Model
We added and updated this Chapter. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part. We updated the content to apply to the Wires Application.
Chapter 6, Logging in to MTS for MTS Administrators
We added and updated this Chapter. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part. MTS is used for Wires Administrator, User, and Branch Management.
Chapter 7, MTS Administrator Management for Wires
We added and updated this Chapter. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part. MTS is used for Wires Administrator, User, and Branch Management.
Chapter 8, Wires User Management
We updated this Chapter. Content on MTS User Management was previously in the Funds Transfers Part. MTS is used for Wires Administrator, User, and Branch Management.
Chapter 9, MTS Branch Management for Wires
We added and updated this Chapter. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part. MTS is used for Wires Administrator, User, and Branch Management.
Chapter 11, Managing Outgoing Wire Fees in Wires
We added this Chapter to describe the process for viewing, adding, updating, and deleting outgoing wires fees in Wires.
Chapter 12, Managing Foreign Exchange Spreads in Wires
We updated the procedures to describe adding, updating, and deleting foreign exchange spreads. We also moved viewing live rates to a separate Chapter.
Chapter 13, Viewing Live Rates in Wires
We added this Chapter. The content was previously combined with Managing Foreign Exchange Spreads.
Chapter 14, Considerations for Outgoing Wires
We added and updated this Chapter. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part. The Chapter includes considerations for outgoing domestic and international wires, IBAN requirements, Country-Specific Guidelines and Sanctions, and Wires deadlines. For compliance related information, see your compliance officer or FINTRAC. Subscribers can also refer to the Operation Manual Program.
Chapter 15, Preparing Outgoing Wires
We added this Chapter. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part. It includes an overview on ascertaining the identify of the sender and identifying a Politically Exposed Person (PEP) and Head of International Organization (HIO), and an overview of record keeping and FINTRAC EFT reporting. For compliance-related information, see your compliance officer or FINTRAC. Subscribers can also refer to the Operations Manual Program. The Chapter also includes instructions for completing the Outgoing Wire Request, Form 1171.
Chapter 16, Creating a Regular Wire
We reorganized the content and clarified information on intermediaries and wires fees.
Chapter 17, Creating a Bank to Bank Wire
We made minor edits and updated images.
Chapter 18, Managing Wires Templates
We made minor edits and updated images.
Chapter 19, Viewing Wires Lists and Wire Details
We made minor edits and updated images.
Chapter 20, Editing an Outgoing Wire
We made minor edits and updated images.
Chapter 21, Approving Outgoing Wires
We clarified that a second approval is required for wires greater than the MTS Level 2 authorization threshold. It previously stated that wires equal to or greater required a second approval. We also made minor edits and updated images.
Chapter 22, Cancelling Outgoing Wires Pending Approval
We made minor edits and updated images. We moved references to recalling outgoing wires to Chapter 24, Recalling, Tracing, and Amending Wires.
Chapter 23, Receiving Incoming Wires
We added content from the Funds Transfers Part including incoming wires routing instructions and information on scanning incoming wires against sanction lists. We also expanded content on reviewing and accepting wires, entering additional information for FINTRAC, and returning incoming wires.
Chapter 24, Recalling, Tracing, and Amending Wires
We added and updated this Chapter. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part.
Chapter 25, Wires Settlement
We consolidated the Chapters for settling incoming and outgoing wires.
Chapter 26, Contingency Procedures for Incoming and Outgoing Wires
We added and updated this Chapter. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part.
Chapter 27, Inter-Branch and Central 1 Corporate Client Transfers
We added and updated this Chapter. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part.
Chapter 28, Business Customers Using
MemberDirect
Â®
Business Services to Create Outgoing Wires
We added and updated this Chapter. The content was previously in the Funds Transfers Part.
Funds Transfers Part
Obsolete
Access and Administration Volume
User Management Part
References to the Funds Transfers Part were updated to the Wires Part.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
Deposit Processing Part
References to the Funds Transfers Part were updated to the Wires Part.
